testcase.name: resumeOrphanedRunsOnStartupReservesAndRestartsRunningRuns
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T19:29:58.714+08:00 WARN 34560 --- [platform-api] [ main] c.w.p.r.p.ResearchPipelineService : [pipeline] found 1 orphaned running research runs on startup; resuming

testcase.name: handleUnhandledPipelineThrowableMarksRunFailed
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-20T19:29:58.728+08:00 ERROR 34560 --- [platform-api] [ main] c.w.p.r.p.ResearchPipelineService : [pipeline] unhandled fatal error in run 453386bb-b056-4cd3-90da-38c288527e51: AssertionError: pipeline thread died

testcase.name: handleFailureMarksRunFailedWhenRollbackIsNotAvailable
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T19:29:58.738+08:00 ERROR 34560 --- [platform-api] [ main] c.w.p.r.p.ResearchPipelineService : [pipeline] run 4aa5fe04-cc8f-4866-914f-9f3f120469a1 failed at stage 1: boom

testcase.name: handleFailureQueuesRollbackWithoutStartingAnotherPipelineInline
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-20T19:29:58.749+08:00 ERROR 34560 --- [platform-api] [ main] c.w.p.r.p.ResearchPipelineService : [pipeline] run d9e39994-b356-4512-ba79-e9d0fdba3875 failed at stage 15: boom 2026-04-20T19:29:58.749+08:00 INFO 34560 --- [platform-api] [ main] c.w.p.r.p.ResearchPipelineService : [pipeline] rolling back run d9e39994-b356-4512-ba79-e9d0fdba3875 from stage 15 to stage 8
